message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide circle


class "base_element" {
    + STARATTR_ONCLICK()
    + addClass(self, cls_name:str)
    + add_attrId(self, attrid:dict)
    + appendChild(self, child:'base_element')
    + containsClass(self, cls_name:str)
    + getAttrByName(self, k:str)
    + getClassList()
    + getElementHTML(self)
    + getIdByClassName(cls)
    + get_Whi(self)
    + hasAttributes(self, k:str)
    + rem_attrDict(self, atrids:dict)
    + removeAllChildrens(self)
    + removeAttribut(self, k:str)
    + replaceChild(self_child:'base_element', old_child:'base_element')
    + setHtmlElement(html_str:newcls,_name:str,newcls:_namestr)
    + setIdNameById(id,k,v,str)
    + setTextContent(text_content:text(str))
    + setVisible(is_visible:bool)
    + toggleClass(self_cls,name:str_force:bool)
}

interface selfmapper{
+add_selftext(_self_,prn):string
+get_textfield(): string 
}



abstract generic_element extends base_element{
   -getAttributeValue(k:v)->v  
   -hasAttributeValue(v:k->k=v   
   -isMySelf(whoFromBaseObj,mgspec_base_MSGSpec_Type,msgdata_typingOptional[base.MSGData_Typel])    
   -removeAttibute(key:value=k-v     
 } 

 abstract ielement{} 


 button --|>ielement
 
 h1--|>button 
 
 textnode-.-h2txt
  
 div-->div
   
 span -->span 
  
 header ->header  
  
 footer --->footer  

 table ---table   

 tr ----tr    

 td -----td     

 th ------th      

 label -------label        

 option --------option          
    
 select ---------select             
            
 input ----------input              
        
 alertbox -----------alertbox               
                
 ledemnt ------------ledement                 
                
 textbox -------------textbox                  
               
 img ----------------img                   
              
 textarea---------------textarea                    
             
 iframe----------------iframe                     
           
 script--------------script                      
          
 style-------------style                       
       
 link------------link                        
      
 meta----------meta                         
    




@enduml
